title: Izzat
subTitle: Constable Ram Chandra teaches his son Siddharth to be a diligent policeman and lead his life with honesty and dignity. Siddharth follows his advice until circumstances force him to leave his ideals.

title: Zehreela Insaan
subTitle: Arjun, a short-tempered person, falls in love with Margaret, but her family is against their relationship. The couple elopes, but destiny forces the duo to commit suicide.

title: Nai Imarat
subTitle: Movie starring Parikshit Sahni, Vidya Sinha and directed by Ram Pahlwa, Sharad Batra.

title: Pyar Kiye Jaa
subTitle: Ramlal, a widower, struggles to find suitable grooms for his daughters and to control his son's film obsession. To make matters worse, one of his former employees launches a protest against him.

title: Prem Kahani
subTitle: Rajesh, an apolitical poet, is in love with Kamini and leads a peaceful life. However, when his brother is killed by the British government, he decides to become a revolutionary and joins the freedom struggle.

title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
subTitle: Sunil, a navy officer, falls for Anuradha. However, things get complicated when Ranjeet, Anuradha's admirer, claims that she is a single mother.

title: Indrajeet
subTitle: Indrajeet, a retired police officer, sets out to take revenge on his ex-lover's brother and friends for murdering his adopted daughter and son-in-law.

title: Bobby
subTitle: Raja, the son of a rich Hindu businessman, falls in love with Bobby, a poor Catholic girl. Though their families try to keep them away from each other, they strive to be together.

title: Samadhi
subTitle: Lakhan Singh gives up his life of crime when he falls in love and marries Champa. However, things take a turn when she falls sick and he is forced to become a criminal again.

title: Samadhi
subTitle: Lakhan Singh gives up his life of crime when he falls in love and marries Champa. However, things take a turn when she falls sick and he is forced to become a criminal again.

title: Rakta Bandhan
subTitle: Chandan is found dead by his twin brother Trishul, who is a dacoit. In a bid to turn a new leaf and leave the criminal life behind, Trishul assumes his brother's identity.

title: Baat Ban Jaye
subTitle: Nisha, a wealthy woman in charge of her family business, does not want to marry a rich man. She falls in love with Suraj Singh, a wedding singer and dancer, without realising that he has other plans.

title: Chitchor
subTitle: When Geeta's sister arranges her wedding with a young engineer, their father mistakenly brings the wrong man home. However, as love blossoms between the two, the arrival of a letter startles everyone.

title: Ponga Pandit
subTitle: Two fathers make arrangements and marry their young children. However, years later when the nuptials are almost finalised, the girl rejects the boy.

title: Hoshiyar
subTitle: Sitadevi's life turns upside down when her husband dies in an accident. To add to her sorrow, one of her sons is separated from her and grows up to be a criminal.

title: Saudagar
subTitle: Moti betrays his loyal wife and business partner, Majubee, to marry his true love, Phoolbanu. However, his selfish act unleashes unforeseen consequences that upend his life.

title: Ladaai
subTitle: A man is wrongly accused and jailed for 18 years. After completing his jail term, he confronts the judge who convicted him and asks her to find the real culprits.

title: Mera Gaon Mera Desh
subTitle: When Ajit, a former prisoner, learns of Jabbar who is terrorising the people of his village, he decides to stand up against him. However, things take a turn when Jabbar abducts Ajit's lover.

title: Suraj
subTitle: King Vikram arranges his daughter Anuradha's match with his commander's son Pratap. However, trouble strikes when Anuradha is abducted by a bandit Suraj when she goes to attend Pratap's coronation.

title: Suraj

title: Nazrana
subTitle: Rajat, a music director, and Mukta, a dancer, get married against the wishes of Mukta's father. Things take a turn when Mukta suspects her husband of having an affair with Sheetal, an upcoming model.
